college_info.college_name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Our college management and infrastructure are not good but it has good teachers.

review_content.Placements: Placements were also not available. The companies will provide an average salary package for freshers. I would recommend students to join this college to learn better.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good. The food served in the canteen was average. But sometimes the food quality was not good. Sports were not encouraged in this college. They only concentrate on sports like cricket, volleyball, and kabbadi.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful to clear our doubts. But few faculty members were available in this college. Semester exams were conducted very strictly. The pass percentage was 60%. If we score below 60 it will be considered as arrear. They did not provide notes to students. The petrochemical course was demandable but there were no faculty members to teach us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are knowledgeable here, and the campus infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: From our college, about 80% of the students got placed. IBM is the top recruiting company of our course. About 90% of the students got internships. Among that, about 75% of the students got internships in Wipro company. Communication skills development course is offered by our college to enhance your skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility, canteen, basketball court, cricket ground, medical facilities, hostel, labs, auditorium, indoor games and outdoor sports are available here. Every year our college conducts sports day and more than 3 industrial visits. Every year our college conducts an outstation tour for more than 3 days.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but facilities are less.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of 2014-2018 batch from the mechanical engineering department. Below 10% of the students were placed from our course. The salary offered is Rs. 10,000-20,000 per month. Tech Mahindra was the only top recruiting company for our course. Maintenance, production and quality were the roles offered to the students of our course. In our course, the salary offered is Rs. 40,000-80,000 per month. About 5% of the students got an internship in Indian Railway.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are less in our college, and the campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and library are good, and labs are also normal. Hostel facilities are mid-range. Quality food is good, but the taste is not that good. Medical and sports and games facilities are available here.

In the hostel, there is an attached toilet and separate bathroom for every room with spacious arrangements. Good sports and medical facilities are available.

admission_overview.college_name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering and Business and Management Studies.

Some of the popular Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology programmes are B.E. / B.Tech, etc at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions:

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech for 3 - 4 years at the UG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in B.E. / B.Tech based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 2,00,000. Check below the Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology eligibility criteria for B.E. / B.Tech: Eligibility Criteria

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: AtIndira Institute of Engineering and Technology, students can enrol in MBA/PGDM at PG level. Admission to the course is made on both merit and entrance basis. The Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM fee isINR 35,000depending upon the specialisation. Find below the key highlights for Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM:

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the PG level,Indira Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers M.E./M.Tech in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 2 years. The curriculum is divided into 4 semesters. Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology M.E./M.Tech admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Construction Engineering, Power Engineering and Computer Science Engineering. reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to earn ethics and knowledge through core papers.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory was well-equipped. The food quality was average. Medical facilities were better. Sports were conducted in this college. The food served in the canteen was better. All facilities were excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college management and infrastructure are not good but it has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not good. The food served in the canteen was average. But sometimes the food quality was not good. Sports were not encouraged in this college. They only concentrate on sports like cricket, volleyball, and kabbadi.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are knowledgeable here, and the campus infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, canteen, basketball court, cricket ground, medical facilities, hostel, labs, auditorium, indoor games and outdoor sports are available here. Every year our college conducts sports day and more than 3 industrial visits. Every year our college conducts an outstation tour for more than 3 days.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but facilities are less.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are less in our college, and the campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and library are good, and labs are also normal. Hostel facilities are mid-range. Quality food is good, but the taste is not that good. Medical and sports and games facilities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: There are great faculty members, so students become future leaders. We got placed well in 2018.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent but not high-class compared to big colleges. There is no Wi-Fi facility, but there are labs and classrooms with proper teaching and good facilities. There is a decent library. The hostel is good, where there will be no ragging. In the hostel, there is an attached toilet and separate bathroom for every room with spacious arrangements. Good sports and medical facilities are available.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sri Bharathi Engineering College for Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

placements.overview: In Khammam Institute of Technology and Science, 435 students admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 289 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 196 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.320000 and 25 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 331 students were admitted, out of which 222 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 187 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.348000 and 27 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2017-18, 264 students were admitted, out of which 186 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 103 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.450000 and 38 students got selected for higher studies.

review_summary.college_name: GHRCEM Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college for placement.

content.Placements: In G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur, every year, new companies offer placements for students, in which 50 to 60% are placed (usually IT/CS branches place more than other branches). Approximately 2.5 to 5 LPA is the average package provided by companies. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, IBM, L&T Infotech, various startups, and domain-specific companies also provide placements at Raisoni.
content.Infrastructure: My department is the MCA department, and the college provides 2 separate computer labs with high-speed internet. It also provides different clean classrooms for each class. G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur, has 4 to 5 canteens with a variety of foods and sitting arrangements for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: G H Raisoni College Of Engineering in Nagpur offers a mixed bag with good placements.

content.Placements: Around 60-80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 16 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Accenture Capgemini TCS Infosys and Wipro are among the prominent recruiters for AI graduates. Approximately 70% of students from the AI and ML branch at G H Raisoni get internships. Some companies where students intern include TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and also smaller companies like Konverge. AI and programming tree, data scientist, AI engineer, and research analyst roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: G H Raisoni College Of Engineering (GHRCE) provides a comprehensive range of facilities for its students, including Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library. There are also hostel facilities, a sports complex, a gym, and medical facilities on campus. G H Raisoni College of Engineering (GHRCE) in Nagpur generally offers decent hostel facilities, average-quality food, good medical services, and sports and games facilities. Some students have expressed satisfaction with the food quality in the mess. Overall, the hostel environment is considered satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Nice campus and worth the admission; cool events.

content.Placements: Average placement; many companies come for campus placements here and offer decent salary packages to all students based on the skills they have acquired in college over the past 3-4 years. This helps them achieve a good LPA by 2024.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in the hostels and colleges is good; there’s even an indoor playground for students, and meals are provided on time. The quality and taste of the food need improvement, but overall, it’s acceptable. The surroundings are nice, and the rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply, even in summer.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is super cool and nice, mostly the college famous for its events.

content.Placements: In my college, mostly students got placed at TWS or Infosys like companies. The highest package was 10 LPA and the average salary was 5 LPA. Technical roles offered were software developer/programmer design and develop software applications or systems. Languages offered were java, python, C+, NET, etc. Web developer build and maintain website and web applications, technologies provided HTML, CSS, javascript, react, angular, PHP, etc. Mobile app developed to create applications for android or iOS platforms. Skills offered were kotlin, swift, flutter, and react native.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college for education.

content.Placements: There are 150 vacancies in the AI department at my college. The highest package was 16 LPA in the 2024 placements. The average package was 4.5 LPA. Top companies like TCS, Wipro, and Amazon visit the college for placements. Many students got internships in Tech Mahindra, TCS, tech companies, etc. A software engineer role is offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-developed. Practical labs have good working computers with excellent Wi-Fi speed. Facilites are excellent. In hostels, the food is hygienic and very good taste. Sports club is available for games. The food quality of the canteen is excellent.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at GHRCEM Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur offers direct admission to BSc, MSc and BCCA courses. Candidates are selected in these courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The minimum qualification required for BSc and BCCA programmes is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for MSc programme.

faqs.question: Can I apply at GHRCEM Nagpur with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at GHRCEM Nagpur. The minimum aggregate required for UG courses is 45%. Hence, aspirants with 60% aggregate in Class 12 can apply for any of the offered UG programmes. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the course-specific selection requirements.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at GHRCEM Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, GHRCEM Nagpur considers entrance exam scores for admission to most of the programmes. The college accepts scores in national or state-level entrance exams such as MAH CET, MHT CET, GATE, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. GHRCEM Nagpur considers entrance exam scores for BTech, MBA, MTech, BCA, BBA and MCA programmes.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at GHRCEM Nagpur?
faqs.answer: GHRCEM Nagpur offers admission to courses based on entrance or qualifying exam scores. The college shortlists candidates for BTech, MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA based on entrance exam scores. GHRCEM accepts scores in GATE, MAH MBA CET, MAH MCA CET, etc. Besides, selection in diploma, BSc, MSc and BBCA programmes is based on the qualifying exam scores of the candidate. Once selected, candidates can participate in CAP with a valid score in the entrance exam. For merit accepting courses, candidates need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for placement.
reviews.review_text: My department is the MCA department, and the college provides 2 separate computer labs with high-speed internet. It also provides different clean classrooms for each class. G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur, has 4 to 5 canteens with a variety of foods and sitting arrangements for students.

reviews.review_heading: G H Raisoni College Of Engineering in Nagpur offers a mixed bag with good placements.
reviews.review_text: G H Raisoni College Of Engineering (GHRCE) provides a comprehensive range of facilities for its students, including Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and a library. There are also hostel facilities, a sports complex, a gym, and medical facilities on campus. G H Raisoni College of Engineering (GHRCE) in Nagpur generally offers decent hostel facilities, average-quality food, good medical services, and sports and games facilities. Some students have expressed satisfaction with the food quality...

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and worth the admission; cool events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the hostels and colleges is good; there’s even an indoor playground for students, and meals are provided on time. The quality and taste of the food need improvement, but overall, it’s acceptable. The surroundings are nice, and the rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply, even in summer.

reviews.review_heading: The college is super cool and nice, mostly the college famous for its events.
reviews.review_text: College was so nice and the classrooms were so clean. The college cleaning staffs were very good. They maintained hygiene and the mess was nice. The Wi-Fi was also very good at work. The lab was super nice and the quality of food was also good as compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-developed. Practical labs have good working computers with excellent Wi-Fi speed. Facilites are excellent. In hostels, the food is hygienic and very good taste. Sports club is available for games. The food quality of the canteen is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take this college.
reviews.review_text: College hostel has very poor infrastructure and very basic mess facilities. College looks good from the outside but is not maintained properly, it has very poor infrastructure and they also sometimes misbehave and don't treat you properly most of the time.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely a perfect college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college or department are good. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a pharmaceutical laboratory, chemistry labs, and also a good library. The hostel is available in our college but I can't afford it because of their high fees. I live 6 kilometers away from college. It also provides good quality sports and grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college, buys rank like NAC A++ from the team that comes to survey, don't take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms of my college are third class like benches are similar to benches in government schools. Chairs in library are broken many students fall when they mistakenly sit on broken chairs. In many classes there is no network on mobile and water filter is not cleaned properly, there are cockroaches and lizards in it.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the city of Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice and awesome infrastructure, well-conditioned rooms, and cleanliness is maintained. Bright paint in every room. No need to worry about climbing every time. An elevator is present. The ventilation of the college is very good. No need to worry about the summers.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, good placement, and decent infrastructure with scope of curriculum update.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure for our college. Classrooms are well ventilized. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. Labs are modern with an updated system and necessary software. The library is not well-stocked, only some books are available. The food in the canteen is quite expensive.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average. Wi-Fi works properly, and the canteen and mess are average. Sports facilities are good on campus as well as in the hostel. Classrooms and labs in the college are as expected, and the library is large. The hostel has four people in one room with two bunk beds, and the feel of the hostel is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: JIET, Kukas is not a college for technology and to increase the knowledge. if someone want to get the degree then its beneficial for him/her. There is so much partiality with familiar and different kinds of persons. NO regular classes, NO Discipline, NO good management. Its just open or aim of the college is to get profit/ earn money. There is no environment like a college for education purpose. And there is also no events and Technical Festival, Seminars to motivate the students. Even if any student want to participate in another college then also college didn't help us and try to stop such steps of students. No educational tour, No picnic.. always search the way to get money from students by extra classes and some useless courses offered. The placement committee is also null. it may be working in other fields but for CIVIL Engg. branch not even a single company visit JIET,kukas. ALL the placements are fixed as there may be some corruption. Faculty is always fresher, not even a single experienced. even the faculty has a backlog. if we complain to HR or head, then no action taken and in reaction we lost our internal and practical marks. faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

answer.text: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

answer.text: The average annual salary of a Mechanical Engineer in India is somewhere around INR 5 LPA to INR 10 LPA. Most of the private and government organizations extend good salary offers to talented candidates who they feel can contribute to the growing field of mechanics and serve as an asset for their business.In todays world there are new technological innovations and emerging trends every day. Individuals with a relevant mechanical skill set are in high demand. Hence BTech Mechanical Engineering graduates get paid quite well from the beginning itself.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Many companies visit our college to offer placements. All the faculty members are well-qualified and meritorious in their academics.

reviews.review_heading: Just select this college, if you want to study in the locality itself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is just about average. It'll not be up to the colleges in the cities like Chennai. The adequate and neat classrooms and labs will be there on the campus. The library will be useful. But, don't expect too much of the infrastructure in this college.

highlights.summary: The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for College of Dairy Technology, Kamareddy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

review_content.Placements: About 100% of students get placed in each batch but the salary packages were very low. It started from 1.8 LPA to 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Amul, Hatsun, Jersey, Heritage, and Karimnagar dairy. Almost every student gets an opportunity for an internship. Quality control manager and production manager were the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were five departments in our college. Each department had its own lab. Students of each year had their own classroom and some are smart ones. Facilities were very fine in hostels. Sports were a part of education and our college gave much importance to it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with our college because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: All the students in our department are offered internships from our course. Some of the students are placed in our course. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA. Dairy technologist is the role offered to students. Amul, Dudley Diary, and Vijaya Dairy are some of the recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food and other facilities in our college are good. Medical facilities are available, and there are good sports and games facilities in our college. Labs, classrooms and library are present in our college, and there are a lot of books available in our library related to our course.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Education is more important .

review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, lab facilities, Wi-Fi in college, hostel, food is awesome in hostel, sports are volleyball, running race, football, cricket, are available, food is dosa poor price dhal and curd. Chapathi idly, maggi chicken, briyani, college campus nearly 60 acres microbiology, Chemistry engineering, technology laboratories available .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college management.

review_content.Placements: No students got placed in the batch of 2016. They made an arrangements for few BPO companies which have visited the college. Management charges some amount for placement cell which doesn't even exit in the campus. Some of my seniors got placed and in my batch as well attending job fairs which was conducted by the companies!
review_content.Infrastructure: There are lot of facilities available in the campus but no use of it due to lack of proper usage. Classrooms and labs are big and clean but the instruments are old. They rented the apartment community for ladies hostel which is outside the college. The maintenance team is really worse.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, but it should be improved.

review_content.Placements: Above 60% of the students from our course got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 12,500 per month. A top company visited our campus for placements is Amazon. I don't know about the roles offered to the students. The salary package offered can vary depending on the type of job. The percentage may be not accurate, but most of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available for the students. The hostel should be maintained in a bit high quality because in the summer season it is too hot. A number of fans available in the hostel rooms are less, and some were not working properly. Food served can be tolerable compared to others, and it is average.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: Is MSc Nursing a good career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes because with MSc Nursing nurses get to work in mnay sectors like multispeciality hospitals, private or government healthcare units, academic or research institutes, nursing homes, old age homes and also armed services.There are many job options like nursing educator, staff nurse, nurse assistant or even nursing supervisor.

review_summary.college_name: RVS Group of Institution, Kannampalayam Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is an amazing college with a great environment to study.

content.Placements: RVS College of Nursing gives its students an excellent environment to spread their wings and achieve great opportunities in life. They provide about 100 to 200 placements every year. Our college is led by MGR University, so we get about 100% placements. Our pass-out students work as nurses all over the world, and they get placement through our college. AIIMS is the best recruitment institute for our college, and there are other hospitals as well.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best environment for our students to study and live in. Our hostels are clean. The food we get from the mess is healthy, with protein and vitamins needed for our health. We have cultural events and sports, along with lots of opportunities for physical and psychological activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college is best to study here.

content.Placements: Not really satisfied with my college placements, maybe in future placements will be better or improved. Right now highest package salary is 10 LPA to 20 LPA. Me and my friends are not satisfied, and the last one is the course details. Me and my friends are not satisfied with placement classes, its just for a basic only.
content.Infrastructure: There is not much hygiene and taste at my college hostel like other hostels. It is not worth for money also. Especially, there are only two canteens and one tea shop all are handled by one contractor. Canteen food is also not much good as we need to improve hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college management.

content.Placements: No students got placed in the batch of 2016. They made an arrangements for few BPO companies which have visited the college. Management charges some amount for placement cell which doesn't even exit in the campus. Some of my seniors got placed and in my batch as well attending job fairs which was conducted by the companies!
content.Infrastructure: There are lot of facilities available in the campus but no use of it due to lack of proper usage. Classrooms and labs are big and clean but the instruments are old. They rented the apartment community for ladies hostel which is outside the college. The maintenance team is really worse.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, but it should be improved.

content.Placements: Above 60% of the students from our course got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 12,500 per month. A top company visited our campus for placements is Amazon. I don't know about the roles offered to the students. The salary package offered can vary depending on the type of job. The percentage may be not accurate, but most of the students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available for the students. The hostel should be maintained in a bit high quality because in the summer season it is too hot. A number of fans available in the hostel rooms are less, and some were not working properly. Food served can be tolerable compared to others, and it is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in placements and atmosphere of our college is good to learn and grow.

content.Placements: Around 45% of the students from our course get placed. Because of backlogs, some students are not able to get placed. The salary package offered ranges from Rs. 10,000 per month to Rs. 45,000 per month. Aspire System's, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc., are the top recruiting companies. Especially software developer and trainee position are offered to students. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. We get 40% of internships from the companies.
content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are the best in our college for our course. There are 3 IBM powered labs. There are comfortable and spacious classrooms. Wi-Fi is available 24x7. The library is always open. The hostel food is in good quality and both veg, and non-veg is provided. There are canteens available near our block.

paragraphs: RVS Group of Institution, Kannampalayam Campus admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, RVS Group of Institution, Kannampalayam Campus considers scores in GATE, NEET, and CEETA for admission to specific courses.RVS Group of Institution, Kannampalayam Campusoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 66 months - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years - 3 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,50,000 - 2,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 35,000 - 50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Good. Average in studies but poor in placements.

content.Placements: Actually, I did not get placed from this college. From placement point of view, I would not recommend anyone to take admission over there. But it all depends on you. After completion, you can search jobs outside.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is also average. The facilities are not up to the mark but we can say it average. The library is nice. Medical facilities are also good. Sports and games facilities are available there. Labs are also average. But Wi-Fi facilities were not available at that time.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very supporting in every branch with laboratories. If you want something to be, they will help you a lot from their side. They are very free to talk, help. If you are having the capabilities, then it's good. Average means 3.5/5.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: It is a good college to pursue B.tech. But you have to be self-motivated. So that you could gain more and more from this college. All the labs are modern and well equipped with lab instruments. The library is full of educational and engineering books. The lectures are very cooperative in all branches of engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Infrastructure is good, but student facility is not available properly. There are no campus recruitment and no technical activities. Student's life is hell there. It’s my suggestion not to take admission in this college. This college is offering cheap courses. But even then the investment is worthless. None of the students got placed in any of the companies. Its better you look for any other college.

reviews_list.review_title: Worst college to go to. It's just spoiling your money, time and career. No placement, no facilities.

review_content.Placements: There was a ratio of 6-10% for my senior batch placement, but it comes to the worst figure of zero by the time our batch had to be placed. Now, no classes are going on, and the college is not even able to provide mark sheets and degrees of the passed out students. Even the security fees of the students is still engaged with the college. College is not providing any favor to the students. No students were placed there and the college spoilt the career of all the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Huge campus spread over a vast area. Wi-fi is not available for students, classrooms are big and blank, the library is full of books and other useful study material. No other activities are there. Food quality is poor. Infrastructure is just a huge big space- no special or fascinating feature is available there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good with great teachers.

review_content.Placements: All students got placed this year in our college. Around 95% of students got placed with an average salary package of 5 LPA - 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cisco, TCS, and Wipro. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. Our college provides great placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. It has a huge library. Our college has well-furnished and well-equipped labs. All computers in the lab are the latest. The hostel is great. The food served in the hostel is decent.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Agra College of Management and Technology Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Agra College of Management and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Teaching & Education. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma and UG Diploma. Agra College of Management and Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Agra College of Management and Technology courses stands around INR 27,000 to 3,80,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend anyone do engineering at this college; they just earn from you and forget.

review_content.Placements: The institute is not that big, and the placement department is also not that active. They provide jobs in small companies where you'll work with some matriculated students, and after the course you'll not get any good opportunities, just work the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some teachers are good, but some are just doing their jobs and earning money, and they don't provide hostels; they don't have any canteens; they just rent a building for a few years, and then they open an institute on it. When I did it, it was in a 3-bedroom type of building.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with college because of intelligent faculty members, placement in best companies, etc.

review_content.Placements: As I know that the last year batch got placements in good company of Delhi, so the students are always be satisfied with the college. My college also provides internship in good company. This college actually offers a lot more courses but the 4 main courses of the college are- Diploma, B.Ed hotel management etc. And the faculty members of the college are very intelligent and well educated.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college classrooms are very fresh and clean, with all time air conditioner for summer, which helps student to feel comfortable in class room. It provides Wi-Fi, with good speed. My college canteen is quite good, the food of the canteen is fresh all the time.

review_summary.college_name: Agra College of Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend anyone do engineering at this college; they just earn from you and forget.

content.Placements: The institute is not that big, and the placement department is also not that active. They provide jobs in small companies where you'll work with some matriculated students, and after the course you'll not get any good opportunities, just work the same.
content.Infrastructure: Some teachers are good, but some are just doing their jobs and earning money, and they don't provide hostels; they don't have any canteens; they just rent a building for a few years, and then they open an institute on it. When I did it, it was in a 3-bedroom type of building.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college because of intelligent faculty members, placement in best companies, etc.

content.Placements: As I know that the last year batch got placements in good company of Delhi, so the students are always be satisfied with the college. My college also provides internship in good company. This college actually offers a lot more courses but the 4 main courses of the college are- Diploma, B.Ed hotel management etc. And the faculty members of the college are very intelligent and well educated.
content.Infrastructure: My college classrooms are very fresh and clean, with all time air conditioner for summer, which helps student to feel comfortable in class room. It provides Wi-Fi, with good speed. My college canteen is quite good, the food of the canteen is fresh all the time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Course curriculum is good but placements are very bad.

review_content.Placements: Placement of the college is not so good but in average 50% students are getting placed in medium scale company like modi rubber ltd, continental ltd, shreeram tyres and some more industries from Meerut and ghaziabad. In addition college also refer students and help them for open placements for multinational company. These open placements are organized by some reputed colleges and government. The college does not provide any internship but they have tie up with some small scale industries for internship programme.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not so big so that's why they don't have separate grounds for various sports. They have two common ground which are used for sports and miscellaneous purpose. College have its own free Wi-Fi and anybody can use it from anywhere with in the campus. Classrooms and labs are good but machines and student ratio in labs are very bad. College library is very good and they also provide free books for one year. Student can choose many books from different author. Their is no restriction on choosing books. Bad thing about the college is that they don't have medical facilities. The college hostels are not so bad. The outer infrastructure of hostel is not attractive but the facility of hostel is very good. Hostel have its own personal Wi-Fi, seperate almirah, tables, chair, B.Ed etc. Also hostel have good maintenance staff. Also their is no ragging problems within students. The senior students are very cooperative with junior students. Hostel mess facility and their staffs are also good. No body can face any issue with hostel food and taste.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahatma Gandhi Institute Of Technical Education And Research Center offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: A company visited the campus to recruit the students of the previous batch, but for my batch, no company has visited. Even now. I think no company visits the campus for placements. I suggest the students, who choose this college, have to prepare on their own to get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very bad infrastructure as there were no sufficient facilities like electricity supply, fans and lights. I must suggest the students not to choose this college if the infrastructure is given importance. Complete resources are not available especially for mechanical engineering subjects like refrigeration and air-conditioning, and also fluid mechanics.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college facilities but dissatisfied with placement.

review_content.Placements: In our college, over all 40% students were placed. But in civil engineering branch no placement. The highest salary package is INR 400,000. The lowest salary package is INR 2,50,000. The average salary package is INR 1,50,000. Top recruitment company is reliance jio for computer engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college civil engineering department have each subjects saparete lab for performing practical in very good environment. In library all the book and reference book available of well known publishers. In our department minimum two faculty for each subjects. Classroom is very good. Transportation facility is very good bus comes at railway station.

review_summary.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi Institute Of Technical Education And Research Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: A company visited the campus to recruit the students of the previous batch, but for my batch, no company has visited. Even now. I think no company visits the campus for placements. I suggest the students, who choose this college, have to prepare on their own to get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very bad infrastructure as there were no sufficient facilities like electricity supply, fans and lights. I must suggest the students not to choose this college if the infrastructure is given importance. Complete resources are not available especially for mechanical engineering subjects like refrigeration and air-conditioning, and also fluid mechanics.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college facilities but dissatisfied with placement.

content.Placements: In our college, over all 40% students were placed. But in civil engineering branch no placement. The highest salary package is INR 400,000. The lowest salary package is INR 2,50,000. The average salary package is INR 1,50,000. Top recruitment company is reliance jio for computer engineering.
content.Infrastructure: In our college civil engineering department have each subjects saparete lab for performing practical in very good environment. In library all the book and reference book available of well known publishers. In our department minimum two faculty for each subjects. Classroom is very good. Transportation facility is very good bus comes at railway station.
